data.name: Hentai Furry Sheepy
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Furry Sheepy — a game for lovers of anime erotica and charming furry characters



Hentai Furry Sheepy is an adult interactive game that combines logic puzzles, attention, and a seductive atmosphere. At the heart of the game is Sheepy — a cute and playful furry sheep girl with soft golden hair gently flowing over her shoulders, neatly curved brown horns, and an irresistibly charming appearance.


Sheepy wears a light blue dress that emphasizes her innocence and tenderness, while a bright red bowtie on her neck adds a touch of playful flirtiness. As you progress through the levels, this shy yet seductive sheep girl will gradually reveal herself from new, increasingly daring sides.


🔹 Game features:


  • Two mini-games in one level:

    • First — a classic memory game: flip tiles and find matching pairs.

    • Second — a jigsaw puzzle featuring Sheepy, unlocked after completing the first mini-game.

    • After completing both stages, a full erotic image of Sheepy in a new outfit is revealed.

  • Plenty of levels to enjoy: 24 levels in each mini-game — 48 exciting stages in total.

  • Progress rewards you: the further you go, the bolder and more explicit Sheepy’s looks become — from a modest sheep girl in a dress to truly hot scenes.

  • Progress & extra content:

    • Achievements for dedicated players.

    • Gallery to view all unlocked Sheepy images.

    • Three difficulty levels: easy, normal, and hard — choose your own pace.


Hentai Furry Sheepy is a sensual adult game that blends enjoyable puzzles with erotic motivation. Clear levels, admire Sheepy’s golden hair, brown horns, and her playful red bowtie, and enjoy every moment spent with this charming furry sheep girl.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
